class.name: PlayFabLeaderboards
class.description: Accessed through [code]PlayFab.leaderboards[/code]. All leaderboard methods require a signed-in [PlayFabUser] and return completion [Signal] values awaited directly.

method.name: submit_score_async
method.description: Submits the score payload for the specified [param user] to the named leaderboard. The completed result data contains the submitted leaderboard name, local id, entity key, and score values.

method.name: get_leaderboard_async
method.description: Queries a page of leaderboard rows for the specified [param user].

method.name: get_leaderboard_around_user_async
method.description: Queries leaderboard rows centered around the specified [param user].

method.name: get_friend_leaderboard_async
method.description: Queries the friend or social leaderboard for the specified [param user]. When [param include_xbox_friends] is [code]true[/code], the service requests the Xbox friend token required by PlayFab.
